CustomField.description: A GUID generated by the Credential_Request_Creation record-triggered flow when a Credential__c is set to Requested status. This token is the sole identifier embedded in the Submission_Link__c URL - the Salesforce record ID is never exposed. Each Credential_Request__c has its own unique, non-guessable token. Must never appear on page layouts or list views visible to external users. See docs/decisions/use-guid-token-for-access-control.md.
CustomField.label: Unique Token
